generated_assessment.reasoning: Her exceptionally high Neuroticism (94th percentile), especially Anger/Hostility (97th) and Anxiety (100th), combined with very low Agreeableness-Trust (22nd pct) and low Agreeableness-Compliance (22nd pct), generate deep skepticism toward mainstream journalism, often perceived as an elite, untrustworthy source that triggers her hostile, anxious vigilance. Moderate Openness (66th pct) could allow curiosity about alternative sources, reinforcing distrust of mainstream outlets, resulting in strong opposition but not maximal categorical rejection because her low Extraversion-Positive Emotions (18th pct) and low Conscientiousness (25th pct) temper the vigour of her stance into non-activist strong disapproval.
